text.source_text: जग त्कारणत्वप्रदर्शनेन सर्वज्ञं ब्रह्मेत्युपक्षिप्तम् , तदेव द्रढयन्नाह —
text.transliteration_iast: jaga tkāraṇatvapradarśanena sarvajñaṃ brahmetyupakṣiptam , tadeva draḍhayannāha —

translation.literal_translation: Having suggested Brahman as omniscient through demonstrating world-causality, he now strengthens that very point -
translation.technical_translation: Transition to 1.1.3 emphasizing omniscience confirmation through scriptural-source reasoning.
translation.interpretive_note: Bridge line from causal definition to epistemic entailment.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Transition note states intent to reinforce previously introduced Brahman omniscience.
Marks continuity from prior causal demonstration to scriptural-source argument.
Bridge from explanatory prose to formal aphoristic assertion.
Ensures argument flow remains cumulative and non-disjunctive.

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S01 pass with stable inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit condensed Mimamsa technical vocabulary and long polemical sentence boundaries in records 1.1.016-1.1.023.
